title: Bell-Deafened
text: Warbell pressure punched a permanent silence through one side of your skull.
flavor: You hear bells best when no one else can.
trigger: Your first command check against a threat each session.
penalty: Gain 1 Heat before rolling unless another player spends a note to steady you.
relief: A follower with the guide or informant role may exhaust to cancel this trigger.
upside: If the command check succeeds, gain a note naming the threat's tell.
